name: Zhejiang Viewshine Intelligent Meter Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Viewshine Intelligent Meter Co.,Ltd develops and supplies smart metering technology and solutions for gas and water customers worldwide. The company offers basic and smart ultrasonic water meters; ultrasonic-residential, ultrasonic-C&I, and mechanical-residential gas meters; Enhanced Metering and Billing Cloud, a modularization-design software; and gateways, repeaters, and HHU devices. Its solutions include AMI, a solution that provides various options of communication, smart meters, and structures for residential, commercial, and industrial applications; Walk-by solution, which consists of wireless smart meter, HHU, converter, and management software; and Prepayment solutions. Zhejiang Viewshine Intelligent Meter Co.,Ltd is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
